sizing_rule.note: Add 1 trading unit for every $1,000 in account equity accumulated. Discrete step increases: Unit 1 @ $1K, Unit 2 @ $2K, Unit 3 @ $5K, Unit 4 @ $15K, Unit 5 @ $75K (max 6 units). This is equity-growth triggered position scaling.

source_rule_text: Increase the number of trading units progressively as account equity grows, scaling position count in discrete steps tied to per-unit capital thresholds.
